title: West Minot

infobox.value: is a neighborhood in [Minot](/wiki/Minot,_North_Dakota "Minot, North Dakota"), [North Dakota](/wiki/North_Dakota "North Dakota"), located in the [Souris River](/wiki/Souris_River "Souris River") Valley.[[1]](#cite_note-1) It borders [Oak Park](/wiki/Oak_Park,_Minot,_North_Dakota "Oak Park, Minot, North Dakota") to the South, [North Hill](/wiki/North_Hill,_Minot "North Hill, Minot") to the North, [Bel Air](/wiki/Bel_Air,_Minot "Bel Air, Minot") to the west and Nubbin Park to the east. The neighborhood is largely residential and there are no commercial thoroughfares, which run through the neighborhood. It received its name when at the time it was the westernmost neighborhood in Minot. Today, there are neighborhoods, such as Bel Air further west of here, but the area has retained the name West Minot. West Minot is home to the Quentin N. Burdick Jobs Center, Minot's Hebrew Cemetery and the West Minot Church of God.[[2]](#cite_note-2)[[3]](#cite_note-3)
1915 standard atlas of Ward County, North Dakota, plat book and patron's directory. Geo. A Ogle & Co., 1915

first_paragraph: **West Minot** is a neighborhood in [Minot](/wiki/Minot,_North_Dakota "Minot, North Dakota"), [North Dakota](/wiki/North_Dakota "North Dakota"), located in the [Souris River](/wiki/Souris_River "Souris River") Valley.[[1]](#cite_note-1) It borders [Oak Park](/wiki/Oak_Park,_Minot,_North_Dakota "Oak Park, Minot, North Dakota") to the South, [North Hill](/wiki/North_Hill,_Minot "North Hill, Minot") to the North, [Bel Air](/wiki/Bel_Air,_Minot "Bel Air, Minot") to the west and Nubbin Park to the east. The neighborhood is largely residential and there are no commercial thoroughfares, which run through the neighborhood. It received its name when at the time it was the westernmost neighborhood in Minot. Today, there are neighborhoods, such as Bel Air further west of here, but the area has retained the name West Minot. West Minot is home to the Quentin N. Burdick Jobs Center, Minot's Hebrew Cemetery and the West Minot Church of God.[[2]](#cite_note-2)[[3]](#cite_note-3)

[Coordinates](/wiki/Geographic_coordinate_system "Geographic coordinate system"): [48°14′50″N 101°19′04″W﻿ / ﻿48.24730°N 101.31768°W﻿ / 48.24730; -101.31768](https://geohack.toolforge.org/geohack.php?pagename=West_Minot&params=48.2473_N_101.31768_W_type:city_region:US-ND)

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

**West Minot** is a neighborhood in [Minot](/wiki/Minot,_North_Dakota "Minot, North Dakota"), [North Dakota](/wiki/North_Dakota "North Dakota"), located in the [Souris River](/wiki/Souris_River "Souris River") Valley.[[1]](#cite_note-1) It borders [Oak Park](/wiki/Oak_Park,_Minot,_North_Dakota "Oak Park, Minot, North Dakota") to the South, [North Hill](/wiki/North_Hill,_Minot "North Hill, Minot") to the North, [Bel Air](/wiki/Bel_Air,_Minot "Bel Air, Minot") to the west and Nubbin Park to the east. The neighborhood is largely residential and there are no commercial thoroughfares, which run through the neighborhood. It received its name when at the time it was the westernmost neighborhood in Minot. Today, there are neighborhoods, such as Bel Air further west of here, but the area has retained the name West Minot. West Minot is home to the Quentin N. Burdick Jobs Center, Minot's Hebrew Cemetery and the West Minot Church of God.[[2]](#cite_note-2)[[3]](#cite_note-3)
